record.field: Look up a member's current belt rank. Use member_name to get a specific member's rank; omit it to list all belt ranks.
What belt is John on? Show me Sarah's belt rank What rank is Test8? What color belt does Mike have? What belt does john smith have? Show all belt ranks
Promote a member to a new belt rank
Promote John to blue belt Advance Sarah to the next rank Test8 earned their green stripe Move Mike up to purple belt Promote Jane to her next belt level
Register a member for an upcoming belt test event, specifying the target belt rank they are testing for
Register Test8 for a blue belt test Schedule a belt test for John testing for green belt Add Sarah to the next belt test for purple belt Sign Mike up for his yellow stripe belt test
Register {member_name} for a belt test (testing for {target_belt})?
Register a member for a belt test by creating a member.rank record
Register John for a blue belt test Sign Sarah up to test for green stripe Add Test8 to the purple belt test
Create a new belt test event/session
Create a belt test for March 30th Schedule a test event for Saturday Create a new belt test called Spring Grading
Register a member for a specific belt test event
Register John for the Spring belt test Sign up Sarah for the upcoming grading event Add Test8 to belt test #5
List members who hold a specific belt color or rank
Show me all blue belts List the black belt members Who has a brown belt? How many purple belts do we have? Show members at the advanced rank
Show the list of members registered for an upcoming belt test event
Who is registered for the upcoming belt test? Show the belt test roster List everyone testing this Saturday Who's signed up for the spring grading? Belt test participant list
List members who have met the attendance threshold for their next belt promotion
Who is ready to be promoted? Which members have enough classes for their next belt? Show me eligible students for belt promotion Who qualifies for their next rank? List members ready for testing
Show belt test readiness for all active ranked members. Returns who is ready to test and who still needs more sessions.

Show belt test readiness for all members Who is ready to test for their next belt? Which members can be promoted? Show me the belt readiness report Who's eligible for belt promotion? Show belt readiness for everyone List all members ready to test
